function_block.description: Function blocks should start with FB_ followed by PascalCase

program.description: Programs should start with PRG_ followed by PascalCase

function.description: Functions should start with FUNC_ followed by PascalCase

interface.description: Interfaces should start with I_ followed by PascalCase

structure.description: Structures should start with ST_ followed by PascalCase

enum.description: Enums should start with E_ followed by PascalCase

type_alias.description: Type aliases should start with T_ followed by PascalCase

global_variable_list.description: Global variable lists should start with GVL_ followed by PascalCase
